final:
module RefModule(
    output reg [7:0] reg_0x29,
    input wire reset,
    input wire wenb,
    input wire [7:0] in_data,
    input wire clk
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always@(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if(reset) begin
        reg_0x29 <= 8'h00;
    end
    else if(!wenb) begin
        reg_0x29 <= in_data;
    end
end

endmodule
